subject.description: A close-up shot of a stressed marketer's hands resting on a sleek modern desk next to an open laptop. The laptop screen is out of focus but shows colorful bar charts trending upwards prominently. Next to the laptop sits a smartphone screen showing a completely empty lead inbox or a 0 performance metric, in sharp focus.
subject.action: Hands resting motionless as if in disbelief or frustration.

setting.location: A dimly lit, modern minimalist office space.

composition.camera_angle: High angle looking down at the desk.
composition.framing: Rule of thirds, drawing the eye from the out-of-focus positive charts to the sharp, negative reality on the phone.

lighting.direction: Side lit by the cool blue glow of the monitors and a warm ambient desk lamp.
lighting.color_grading: High contrast, cool tones, slightly desaturated to evoke stress and the 'black box' mystery.

negative_prompt: text, watermarks, bad anatomy, deformities, cluttered desk, extra fingers, cartoonish, 3d render
